evals.prompt: Bearbeite den Posteingang. Verarbeite alle E-Mails in info@nicolstanzel.de und beantworte sie.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs all 4 agents in sequence (triager -> validator -> responder -> executor). Triage result is written to /tmp/gmail-triage-result.json, validation to /tmp/gmail-validation-result.json, responses to /tmp/gmail-responses.json, execution results to /tmp/gmail-execution-result.json. All inbox emails are either answered and archived, or archived (system mails). Drafts folder is cleaned up.
expectations: Skill reads /tmp/gmail-triage-result.json before proceeding to validation
Skill invokes gmail-validator agent for emails requiring Stripe/Circle checks
Skill invokes gmail-responder agent to formulate HTML replies
Skill invokes gmail-executor agent to send emails and batch-archive
gws batchModify is used (not individual modify calls) for archiving
No internal system names (Stripe, Supabase, Circle API) appear in any email body

evals.prompt: Es gibt eine E-Mail von sandra.mueller@web.de - sie will ihre monatliche Mitgliedschaft kündigen (189 EUR). Bearbeite das.
evals.expected_output: The skill identifies this as TYPE_B (coaching installment, not cancellable). It sends a reframing email explaining it's a payment installment, not a subscription. It does NOT cancel in Stripe. The email uses Nicol's warm, direct voice without apologies or em-dashes.
expectations: Stripe data is checked before responding (price 189 EUR/month = TYPE_B)
Response email contains reframing language about 'Ratenzahlung'
Response does NOT contain 'Tut mir leid', 'Entschuldigung', or em-dashes

evals.prompt: Posteingang verarbeiten. Es gibt u.a. eine Nachricht von noreply@paypal.com über eine fehlgeschlagene Zahlung.
evals.expected_output: The system notification from noreply@paypal.com is categorized as 'system' by the triager and goes directly to archive_ids — it is NOT answered. The email is removed from inbox via batchModify.
expectations: No response email is composed or sent to the PayPal address
Email ID appears in archive_ids in the triage result
